uses: Cubilia cubili is a plant species used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world. Its roots and leaves are believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. In some cultures, the plant is used to treat fever, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems. The plant's extracts are also used to treat skin conditions such as wounds, burns, and eczema. Further research is needed to fully understand the medicinal properties and potential applications of Cubilia cubili.
